TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_abas

S.FORM: sikawma pa iku haw pakunku tu zana qmudu tu biat.
S.TRANSL: 我要講一個關於養青蛙的故事。
I’m going to tell a story, starting from keeping a frog.

S.FORM: yau sunis a zau qmudu tu biyat qmudu tu wasu nani.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩養了一隻青蛙和一隻狗。
There is a child who keeps a frog and a dog.

S.FORM: taytaan na sunis a zau biatna tapeRaskuan atu wasu unay nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩看著他在瓶子裡的青蛙，還有狗。
This child looks at his frog in the bottle and that dog.

S.FORM: mlizaq tmayta tu wasu biatna sRi wasu a yau tu.
S.TRANSL: 看著他的青蛙和狗，很高興，然後… (FLIPPING THE PAGE)
Looking at his frog and that dog, he feels happy, and...

S.FORM: tu tuRabi ti nani maynep ti ya sunis a zau.
S.TRANSL: 到了晚上，這個小孩睡著了。
And when the night falls, this child also falls asleep.

S.FORM: mangu mRaRiw a biatna sayza ya maynep a sunis a zau qaRatuRabi.
S.TRANSL: 結果他的青蛙跑走了，可能(因為)小孩晚上在睡覺。
And it turns out that his frog runs away, perhaps (because) this child has fallen asleep in the late evening.

S.FORM: tu tabRabi masuat nani taytaanna tapuduqan a biyat a yau nani mai ti.
S.TRANSL: 早上醒來後，他看瓶子裡的青蛙，結果不見了。
And after waking up in the morning, he looks into the bottle for that frog, but it is gone?!

S.FORM: ou nian ti biatku zinna sunis a zau.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩說，oh，我的青蛙在哪裡?
‘Oh, where is my frog?,’ said this child.

S.FORM: tu wiya ti kmilim kmilim ti sunis a zau tu biatna nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩去找，去找他的青蛙。
So this child goes searching, searching for his frog.

S.FORM: ou pasi yau taRasuRanna na zpu na kucu zinna sayza na sunis a zau nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩可能想說，可能在我的拖鞋，鞋子裡面。
This child thinks, ‘Ooh, it’s probably inside the shoes.’

S.FORM: wa wiya ti biquluanna ti ya zpuna amagucuna sayza ‘u kmilim tu biat nani.
S.TRANSL: 他翻他的鞋子，或可能是他的雨鞋，要找青蛙。
He goes turning over his shoes, or his rain boots perhaps, to search for the frog.

S.FORM: sRi wasu a yau pasi yau tapuduqan ya ya biat a zau zinna sayza na wasu a zau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗想說可能在瓶子裡。
As for the dog, it thinks that (the frog) is probably in the bottle.

S.FORM: susuRanna ti na uRuna ya peRasku a yau qnizuanan na biyat.
S.TRANSL: 狗把頭鑽進瓶子裡，青蛙曾住過的地方。
So it squeezes his head into the bottle, where the frog once resided.

S.FORM: tu Rayngu ti alaan Rayngu ti ‘etusan ya uRu na wasu a zau.
S.TRANSL: 狗不能拿..不能把頭拔出來。
And the dog can’t take, can’t pull out its head.

S.FORM: tu wiya ti kmilim tu biat a yau ya sunis a yau masulun tu wasu a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩去找青蛙，跟狗一起。
And then that child goes searching for the frog, accompanied by his dog.

S.FORM: …(09)mangu yau sikubuanna na wasu a yau a peRasku a qnizuanan na biat a yau.
S.TRANSL: 結果狗把瓶子戴在頭上，青蛙曾經住過的地方。
It turns out that the dog is wears the bottle on its head, where the frog once resided.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani yau qumRas sunis a yau tu biat a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這裡，小孩在叫青蛙。
At this point (when it (i.e. the story) comes here), the child is yelling out for the frog.

S.FORM: yau qaya wasu a yau mRaytungtunguz kmilim qaya tu biat a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 狗也在叫，也在找青蛙。
The dog also keeps barking and barking and search for the frog.

S.FORM: masulun tu lazat a yau qumRas ta biyat a yau nani tmibuq ti wasu a yau tu.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗跟著那個人，叫青蛙，然後掉下去了。
When following the man to yell out for the frog, the dog falls down, and..

S.FORM: mabedung ti ya peRasku a yau snikubu na wasu a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 狗戴在頭上的瓶子破了。
The bottle that the dog wears on its head breaks (into pieces).

S.FORM: syazi ti tazian mai ti peRasku a yau.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，瓶子沒有了。
At this point (when it comes here), the bottle is gone (off the dog’s head).

S.FORM: taytaanna ti na sunis a zau nani mai ti ya snikubu na wasu kutu peRasku a yau zinna tu alaanna ti na sunis a zau bawa’ ya wasu zau.
S.TRANSL: 看到小狗戴在頭上的瓶子不見了，這個小孩抱起了狗。
When seeing the bottle that the dog wears gone (off the dog’s head), this child holds up the dog.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani yau ti qumRas sunis a yau ta biat a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，小孩在叫青蛙。
At this point (when it comes here), the child is yelling out for the frog.

S.FORM: wasu a zau na yau Raytungtunguz qumRas tu biat a yau sayza nani.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙一直叫，可能在叫青蛙。
As for the dog, it keeps barking and barking, yelling out for the frog perhaps.

S.FORM: taytaanna ti na tuliq a yau sayza ya lazat a zau atu wasu a zau nani mzazukat ti tuliq a yau ngil qaRat tu lazat a zau atu sunis a zau nani.
S.TRANSL: 這些蜜蜂看到小孩和狗，就一直跑出來，想要咬這個人和這個小孩。
Perhaps because those wasps see this person and this dog, they keep coming out (of their nest), wanting to sting this person and this child.

S.FORM: maytis ti sunis a zau.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩很害怕。
This child is afraid (of the wasps).

S.FORM: tu syazi tazian nani maken ti tmayta tu tuliq a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，真的看到蜜蜂了。
At this point (when it comes here), (he) really sees those wasps.

S.FORM: wi ta babaw tuliq a yau.
S.TRANSL: 那些蜜蜂在上面。
Those wasps are high above.

S.FORM: qmubet ti ya sunis a zau qnaytisan tu tuliq a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩蹲下來，(因為)怕蜜蜂。
Afraid of those wasps, this child crouches down.

S.FORM: yau wasu a yau mRaytunguz.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗在叫。
That dog is barking.

S.FORM: pasya babaw mRaytunguz tu tuliq a zau ya sunis a zau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩向上對蜜蜂叫。
This child is barking up at the wasps.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani maytis ti sayza sunis a zau tu tuliq a zau muRing ti.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，小孩怕這些蜜蜂，就哭了。
At this point (when it comes here), this child has cried up, perhaps because he is afraid of these wasps.

S.FORM: taytaanna nani yau a wasuna mutun yau a mutun yau a wasu miza mRaytunguz tu tuliq a yau.
S.TRANSL: 他看到有他的狗…老鼠…有老鼠有狗，在做…對蜜蜂叫。
When he looks (up), (he finds) his dog… the mouse.., the mouse and the dog are doing, uh, barking at those wasps.

S.FORM: tu muRing a sunis a yau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在哭。
And the child is crying.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani tmibuq ti ya tuliq a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，蜂(窩)掉下來了。
At this point (when it comes here), the (nest of) wasps has fallen down.

S.FORM: maytis ti ya wasu a yau ngil ti zaqis tu paRin qnaytisan tu tuliq a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗很害怕，(所以)想爬上樹，(因為)怕蜜蜂。
That dog is afraid, (so) it wants to climb up to the tree, being afraid of those wasps.

S.FORM: yau a mutun a yau qaya tmayta tu wasu a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個老鼠也看著那隻狗。
There is also the mouse watching the dog.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani taytaanna na sunis a yau mzaqis tu paRin a sunis a zau nani.
S.TRANSL: 來到這邊，小孩看到…這個小孩爬上樹。
At this point (when it comes here), that child sees.., this child climbs up to the tree.

S.FORM: yau a tangan na paRin a yau.
S.TRANSL: 樹有洞。
There is a hole on the tree.

S.FORM: pasi yau tazian ya biatku zinna sayza na sunis a zau pankelanna ya tanganna mai ya biat a yau.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩可能想說，我的青蛙可能在這裡，(所以)它往洞裡瞧，(可是)青蛙不在那裡。
This child perhaps thinks, “My frog is probably here,” (so) he peeks into the hole, but the frog is not there.

S.FORM: tu syazi ti tazian nani au zaqis pa ita tu paRin zinna sayza na sunis a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，小孩可能說，我們要爬樹。
And when it comes here, perhaps the child says, “We’re going to climb up to the tree.”

S.FORM: pameng ti mzukat ya ku a zau.
S.TRANSL: 突然，貓頭鷹出來了。
Suddenly (out of the hole) comes an owl.

S.FORM: tu maytis ti ya sunis a zau tu ku a zau sayza tu tmibuq ti sunis a zau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩可能怕這個貓頭鷹，就掉下去了。
And perhaps because the child is afraid of this owl, he falls down (off the tree).

S.FORM: wasu a yau qaya nani wiya ti mRaRiw tu tanuzan na tuliq ya wasu a zau.
S.TRANSL: 狗也跑走了，(因為)它被蜜蜂追。
The dog also runs away, for it’s being chased by the wasps.

S.FORM: syazi tazian qaya na zaqis pa iku tu zaqis pa iku tabubungaRan zin na sunis a zau sayza nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，小孩可能想說，我要爬樹。
At this point (when it comes here) again, perhaps this child thinks, “I’m going to climb eh…, I’m going to climb up to the rock.”

S.FORM: HIGHPITCHtaytaanna naniHIGHPITCH yau tuliq ‘a ku a yau tmanuz tu sunis a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩看到，有蜜蜂…貓頭鷹在追那個小孩。
When the child looks (up), (he finds) the wasps, uh, the owl chasing him.

S.FORM: wiya ti mRaRiw sunis a zau nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩跑走。
And this child runs away.

S.FORM: pameng ti yau mzukat a siRmuq a zau tu azu ti uzunganna.
S.TRANSL: 突然,鹿出來了，好像扛在背上。
All of a sudden, (out from behind the rock) comes a deer, and it is like, (the deer) carries (the child) on its back.

S.FORM: yau tayan ta babaw na buRang a sunis a zau nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩在石頭上面。
The child is there on the top of the rock.

S.FORM: pameng ti yau tauRuanna na siRmuq mzaqis a sunis a zau.
S.TRANSL: 突然，小孩爬到鹿的頭上。
All of a sudden, onto the head of the deer climbs this child.

S.FORM: tu wiya ti mRaRiw a siRmuq a yau nani yau ti tauRuan na siRmuq a sunis a zau uzungan na siRmuq.
S.TRANSL: 鹿跑走了，小孩在鹿的頭上，被鹿扛在背上。
And then the deer runs away, and the child is on the head of the deer, carried by the deer on its back.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani mau nizi tauRuan na siRmuq a sunis a zau nani mangu tmibuq ti.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，小孩原本在鹿的頭上，結果掉下來了。
At this point (when it comes here), the child previously on the head of the deer turns out to fall down.

S.FORM: yau tmibuq ti ya sunis a zau zinna sayza na siRmuq a zau nani.
S.TRANSL: 鹿可能想說，小孩掉下去了。
Perhaps the deer thinks, “The child is falling down.”

S.FORM: yau a wasuna qaya ‘u yau a mutun cye ke su.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗也(掉下去了)，有老鼠…這個是…
His dog is also (falling down), as well as the mouse…, what is this?

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani nizi tauRuan na siRmuq a sunis a zau nani tmibuq ti pasazi tazanzanuman.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，小孩從鹿的頭上掉到水裡。
At this point (when it comes here), the child has fallen off from the head of the deer into the water.

S.FORM: pasyababaw ti ya zapanna.
S.TRANSL: 他的腳在上面。
His feet are up in the air.

S.FORM: wiya ti ta teRaq na zanum a uRuna.
S.TRANSL: 他的頭在水裡面。
His head (plunges) into the water.

S.FORM: masulun tu wasuna qaya tmibuq nani.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗也一起掉下去。
His dog also falls (into the water) together with (him).

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani mzukat ti nizi tazanzanuman sunis a zau sRi wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，小孩和狗從水裡出來了。
At this point (when it comes here), the child as well as his dog has come out of the water.

S.FORM: tu uzunganna ti na sunis a zau ya wasuna mzukat nizi tazanzanuman.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩背著他的狗，從水裡出來。
And then the child comes out of the water, carrying his dog on his back.

S.FORM: yau ti takinilan na paRin ya sunis a zau nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩在樹的旁邊。
This child is beside a tree.

S.FORM: yau ngil Ritunguz sayza ya wasu a zau nani LOWVOLUMEqalimekka naRin sikawma naRin smuniLOWVOLUME zinna na lazat na sunis a zau ya wasuna tu.
S.TRANSL: 可能狗要叫，小孩就對他的狗說，安靜!不要說話，不要出聲。
Perhaps because the dog is about to bark, the man, the child says to his dog, “Be quiet! Don’t talk! Don’t make any sound.”

S.FORM: mlimek ti ya wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗安靜了。
So his dog keeps quiet.

S.FORM: tu syazi tazian nani mzaqis ti tu paRin.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，(他們)爬樹。
At this point (when it comes here), (they are) climbing the tree.

S.FORM: ta babaw na paRin ya sunis a zau sRi wasu ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩和那隻狗在樹上。
This child and that dog are on top of the tree.

S.FORM: mautu ti pasazi nani yau ta babaw na paRin sunis a yau atu wasu a yau nani taytaanna ti ya biyatna.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，小孩和狗在樹上，他們看到他們的青蛙。
At this point (when it comes here), when that child and that dog are on top of the tree, they see their frog.

S.FORM: ou yau a biatta tazian zinna ti sayza na sunis a zau atu wasu a zau nani.
S.TRANSL: “喔，我們的青蛙在這裡”，小孩和狗可能這樣想。
“Oh, our frog is here,” the child and the dog perhaps think so.

S.FORM: mlizaq ti.
S.TRANSL: (他們)很高興。
(They) feel happy.

S.FORM: syazi tazian ta tausiqan paRin nani yau ti ya biat a yau qenalizaq na sunis a yau sayza nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，在一棵樹上，青蛙出現了，小孩或許覺得很高興。
At this point (when it comes here) on one tree, the frogs show up, and that’s perhaps (why) that child felt happy.

S.FORM: mlizaq ti wasu a yau sRi sunis a yau tazian ‘u.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗在這邊很高興。
The dog and the child is very happy right here.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani yau a sunis a yau maRaw ti tu biat a yau ta babaw na paRin.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊，小孩望著在樹上的青蛙。
At this point (when it comes here), that child is looking afar at those frogs on the tree.

S.FORM: yau ta babaw na paRin ya biat a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 樹上有青蛙。
There are frogs on the tree.

S.FORM: yau qmuRiRiz a sunis a zau tamamanayan sRi wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩坐在地上。
This child is sitting directly on the ground, along with his dog.

S.FORM: tu yau ti ‘e qmuni zinta snazau smani.
S.TRANSL: 有…ㄜ..我不知道我們怎麼說。
And then there are…, well, we don’t know how to put this.

S.FORM: yau mlizaq ti sayza ya sunis a zau tmayta tu biat a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 看到這些青蛙，小孩很高興。
Seeing those frogs, this child perhaps feels happy.

S.FORM: pasyababaw ti limana azu ti pmiqpiq tu lima sayza.
S.TRANSL: 他的手舉起來，可能好像在拍手。
His hands are up in the air, like (he’s) clapping his hands maybe.

S.FORM: qenalizaqan tu pnakalaanna tu biyat a yau.
S.TRANSL: 他很高興他找到青蛙了。
He felt happy that he found out the frog.

S.FORM: ((VOICEOVER:mai ti)).
S.TRANSL: 沒了嗎?
Is it over?

S.FORM: mai ti haw.
S.TRANSL: 沒了。
It’s over.
